speaker: HAMLET
text_entry: To be, or not to be: that is the question.

speaker: HAMLET
text_entry: The time is out of joint: O cursed spite.

speaker: LADY MACBETH
text_entry: Out, damned spot! out, I say!

speaker: MACBETH
text_entry: Methought I heard a voice cry Sleep no more!

speaker: LADY MACBETH
text_entry: Look like the innocent flower, but be the serpent under it.

speaker: OTHELLO
text_entry: She loved me for the dangers I had passed.

speaker: OTHELLO
text_entry: Then must you speak of one that loved not wisely but too well.

speaker: KING LEAR
text_entry: Blow, winds, and crack your cheeks! rage! blow!

speaker: MARK ANTONY
text_entry: Friends, Romans, countrymen, lend me your ears.

speaker: ROMEO
text_entry: But, soft! what light through yonder window breaks?

speaker: ROMEO
text_entry: It is the east, and Juliet is the sun.
